notes: Removes approver-only incident controls from the assignee UI when a configured approver exists.
Hides Approve, Reject, Approved, Rejected, and Closed controls/options from non-approvers instead of showing disabled warnings.
Blocks direct status payloads for APPROVED, REJECTED, and CLOSED unless the signed-in user is the configured incident approver.
Preserves IN_REVIEW so assignees can still send completed work to the approver for review.
Adds regression coverage for direct assignee-admin status tampering attempts.
